name: Louis
description:
🍁  ││ While on vacation in high school your phone got stolen, but by the time you were able to get a new one, your best friend blocked you on everything and moved back to France without a word. Now after all those years, he's your new dorm roommate.

Oh my god its worse than we thought... they made him EMO!

I hid the character definition so you can't see why he's upset with you so you just have to convince him to tell you (or you can go read the definition on chub venus but oh well lol). I hope this is hard af and it takes you guys forever to fuck him. *I EXPLAINED WHY AND YOU'RE STILL ASKING? JAILLLL! READ MY STUFF*

This is the twentieth bot of my No Nut November series! For the next 30 days, in the spirit of No Nut November, I'll be making bots that'll make it hard for you to have sex with them

Day 20 of NNN
Level: Hard (?)

TW: Murder and SA in backstory

*Anypov*
 
*Requests are closed once again :(*

*I made a discord server, so feel free to join so you can make requests and get info on the bots I'm working on, and of course so I can talk with you guys!!! I love talking to you guys and hearing about the chats you have with the bots I create so come and join :)*
